title: SOURCE SECRET TOPIC SPOTTING ERROR101 200 BY @AMITJ

questions.question: Q101. He was / bad injured / in the / last match. (SSC CGL 26/09/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'bad' with 'badly'. Adverb needed to modify 'injured'. 'Injured' क्रिया की विशेषता बताने के लिए क्रियाविशेषण 'badly' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q102. My sister and I / work and I / work very hard / nevertheless my brother does not do / any task assigned to him. (SSC CGL 26/09/2024 3rd Shift)
options: nevertheless my brother does not do
questions.explanation: Replace 'nevertheless' with 'but' or 'whereas'. Contrast between clauses. दो वाक्यों के बीच विरोधाभास दिखाने के लिए 'but' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q103. The couple /preferred to walk / until the last house / of the town. (SSC CHSL 01/07/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'until' with 'to'. Destination indicator. गंतव्य के लिए 'to' का प्रयोग करें, 'until' समय के लिए होता है।

questions.question: Q104. Ramayana is an ancient Sanskrit epic; it is believed to be written around 500 BC to 100 BC. (SSC CHSL 01/07/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Add 'The' before 'Ramayana'. Holy books take definite articles. धार्मिक ग्रंथों के नाम से पहले 'The' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q105. Hard had she /thrown the basketball/when it fell /on the ground. (SSC CHSL 01/07/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'Hard' with 'Hardly'. Inversion with 'Hardly... when'. 'Hardly' के साथ 'when' का प्रयोग होता है।

questions.question: Q106. The project was completed / more quicker / than expected (SSC CHSL 01/07/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Remove 'more'. 'Quicker' is already comparative. 'More' हटा दें, 'Quicker' पहले से ही तुलनात्मक है।

questions.question: Q107. If you had apprised me about your problem earlier, I would have allow you to go. (SSC CHSL 01/07/2024 3rd Shift)
options: If you apprised me about your problem earlier, I would have allowed you to go.
If you can apprise me about your problem earlier, I would have allowed you to go.
If you had apprised me about your problem earlier, I would have allowed you to go.
If you had apprised me about your problem earlier, I would allow you to go.
questions.explanation: Replace 'allow' with 'allowed'. Third conditional structure (would have + V3). Third conditional में 'would have + V3' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q108. Harmit is not innocent such as Uday. (SSC CHSL 01/07/2024 3rd Shift)
options: Harmit is not as innocent as Uday.
Harmit is not as innocent more than Uday.
Harmit is not as much as innocent as Uday.
Harmit is not innocent than Uday.
questions.explanation: Use 'as...as' for comparison. तुलना के लिए 'as...as' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q109. When it / come to football, / my brother is / an addict. (SSC CHSL 01/07/2024 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'come' with 'comes'. Subject 'it' is singular. 'It' एकवचन है, इसलिए 'comes' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q110. Throw of / the old shoes; / nobody will wear / them now. (SSC CHSL 01/07/2024 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'Throw of' with 'Throw away' or 'Throw off'. 'Throw of' गलत है, 'Throw away' (फेंक देना) सही है।

questions.question: Q111. They have decided to wind out / their business / without delay. (SSC CHSL 02/07/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'wind out' with 'wind up'. 'Wind up' means to close. 'Wind up' का अर्थ है व्यवसाय बंद करना।

questions.question: Q112. Since the little girl answers / a few simple questions, / her parents say that / she is too intelligent. (SSC CHSL 02/07/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'too' with 'very'. 'Too' implies negative excess. 'Too' नकारात्मक अर्थ देता है, यहाँ 'very' (बहुत) सही है।

questions.question: Q113. It is difficult to live in / the societal expectations / when one has / fewer resources. (SSC CHSL 02/07/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'live in' with 'live up to'. 'Live up to expectations' is the idiom. 'उम्मीदों पर खरा उतरना' के लिए 'live up to' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q114. The teacher was / taken back by / the audacity of / the new student. (SSC CHSL 02/07/2024 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'taken back' with 'taken aback'. 'Taken aback' means surprised. 'Taken aback' का अर्थ है आश्चर्यचकित होना।

questions.question: Q115. His mother's transfer from a small town to Delhi brought up a huge change in his schooling. (SSC CHSL 03/07/2024 1st Shift)
options: from a small town to Delhi
questions.explanation: Replace 'brought up' with 'brought about'. 'Brought about' means caused. 'Brought about' का अर्थ है कारण बनना।

questions.question: Q116. Mrs. Meera and family / received his letter / a week ago (SSC CHSL 03/07/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Change to 'Mrs. Meera and her family'. Possessive needed. 'Her family' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q117. Petrified wood is type of fossilised wood that exhibits the original details of the wood (SSC CHSL 03/07/2024 1st Shift)
options: The petrified wood is the type of fossilised wood that exhibits a original details of the wood
A petrified wood is type of fossilised wood that exhibits an original details of the wood.
Petrified wood is a type of fossilised wood that exhibits the original details of the wood.
Petrified wood is the type of fossilised wood that exhibits a original details of the wood
questions.explanation: Add 'a' before 'type'. Singular countable noun. 'Type' से पहले 'a' लगाएँ।

questions.question: Q118. (1) When Christy (2) grew out, (3) he turned out (4) to be a gentleman. (SSC CHSL 03/07/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'grew out' with 'grew up'. 'Grow up' means to mature. 'Grow up' का अर्थ है बड़ा होना।

questions.question: Q119. The meeting / will taking / place next / Wednesday. (SSC CHSL 03/07/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'will taking' with 'will take'. Modals take V1. Modals के साथ V1 का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q120. Rashmi was / quite amusing when / she heard about / what had happened. (SSC CHSL 03/07/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'amusing' with 'amused'. She felt amused. वह 'amused' (मनोरंजित) महसूस कर रही थी।

questions.question: Q121. Please remember to take / your notice to the reception area / if you want it to be displayed / upon the bulletin board. (SSC CHSL 03/07/2024 3rd Shift)
options: if you want it to be displayed
your notice to the reception area
questions.explanation: Replace 'upon' with 'on'. Display 'on' a board. बोर्ड 'पर' (on) प्रदर्शित करें।

questions.question: Q122. Today she said to her friend, "You're the sweetest person I have met ever". (SSC CHSL 03/07/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'met ever' with 'ever met'. Adverb placement. 'Ever' का प्रयोग 'met' से पहले करें।

questions.question: Q123. The class / teacher was / wounded in / a leg. (SSC CHSL 03/07/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'a leg' with 'the leg'. Specific body part. शरीर के विशिष्ट अंग के लिए 'the' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q124. I had seen / her with her mother / in the cinema hall / yesterday. (SSC CHSL 03/07/2024 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'had seen' with 'saw'. 'Yesterday' takes simple past. 'Yesterday' के साथ simple past का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q125. Mr. Narayanan / is a rather / lazy man. (SSC CHSL 03/07/2024 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'is a rather' with 'is rather a'. 'Rather a' is common usage. 'Rather a' सही क्रम है।

questions.question: Q126. My students are / waiting for / their flights / at the gate no. 6. (SSC CHSL 04/07/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Remove 'the' before 'gate no. 6'. Numbered nouns don't take articles. गिने हुए संज्ञाओं के साथ article न लगाएँ।

questions.question: Q127. She will being studying for her exams tomorrow. (SSC CHSL 04/07/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'will being' with 'will be'. Future continuous. Future continuous के लिए 'will be' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q128. I am writing to invite you / to give a presentation / for our Jobs and Careers Conference / for engineering graduates. (SSC CHSL 04/07/2024 2nd Shift)
options: I am writing to invite you
for our Jobs and Careers Conference
questions.explanation: Replace 'for' with 'at'. Presentation 'at' a conference. सम्मेलन 'में' (at) प्रस्तुति।

questions.question: Q129. The companies were / giving in the prizes / to attract customers / during the festive season. (SSC CHSL 04/07/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'giving in' with 'giving away'. Distributing. 'Giving away' का अर्थ है बांटना।

questions.question: Q130. This artwork / are a wonderful example / of the period's vogue / for realistic style. (SSC CHSL 04/07/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'are' with 'is'. Singular subject 'artwork'. 'Artwork' एकवचन है।

questions.question: Q131. Prateek was planning to ask Shreya for a favour. But he could not muster up the courage. So, he blacked out. (SSC CHSL 04/07/2024 3rd Shift)
options: Prateek was planning to ask Shreya for a favour. But he could not muster up the courage. So, he broke in.
Prateek was planning to ask Shreya for a favour. But he could not muster up the courage. So, he chickened out.
Prateek was planning to ask Shreya for a favour. But he could not muster up the courage. So, he checked out.
Prateek was planning to ask Shreya for a favour. But he could not muster up the courage. So, he turned down.
questions.explanation: 'Chickened out' means to withdraw due to fear. डर के कारण पीछे हटना।

questions.question: Q132. She was singing / beautifully in / the concert hall / last night. (SSC CHSL 04/07/2024 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'was singing' with 'sang'. 'Last night' indicates simple past. 'Last night' के लिए simple past का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q133. The police inspector was trying to give out the contradicting stories in the scene of the accident. (SSC CHSL 04/07/2024 4th Shift)
options: The police inspector was trying to lighten up the contradicting stories in the scene of the accident.
The police inspector was trying to sign up the contradicting stories in the scene of the accident.
The police inspector was trying to sort out the contradicting stories in the scene of the accident.
The police inspector was trying to rush out the contradicting stories in the scene of the accident.
questions.explanation: 'Sort out' means to resolve or organize. 'Sort out' का अर्थ है सुलझाना।

questions.question: Q134. The aeroplane took down / without the passengers after / making a sudden announcement. (SSC CHSL 05/07/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'took down' with 'took off'. Plane taking flight. विमान के उड़ान भरने के लिए 'took off' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q135. Emily is a American living in Paris for her work. (SSC CHSL 05/07/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'a' with 'an'. 'American' starts with a vowel sound. 'American' स्वर ध्वनि से शुरू होता है।

questions.question: Q136. This is / a doll / and there is / a umbrella. (SSC CHSL 05/07/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'a' with 'an'. 'Umbrella' starts with a vowel sound. 'Umbrella' स्वर ध्वनि से शुरू होता है।

questions.question: Q137. Even in cold weather, the reliable car always started on the first try. (SSC CHSL 05/07/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Dependable' is a synonym for 'reliable'. 'Reliable' का पर्यायवाची 'dependable' है।

questions.question: Q138. The soldiers / were selected / on the section / of 'gallantry of spirits'. (SSC CHSL 05/07/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'section' with 'basis'. On the basis of. 'के आधार पर' (on the basis of) का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q139. The make-up room was filled / with incadescent lights / which added to the misery / of those subjected to make-up. (SSC CHSL 05/07/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Spelling error. 'Incandescent' is correct. 'Incandescent' सही वर्तनी है।

questions.question: Q140. If she exercises daily, / she would / remain energetic / and fit forever. (SSC CHSL 05/07/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'would' with 'will'. First conditional. First conditional में 'will' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q141. A owl is a bird which has wide eyes, asymmetrical ears and is found mostly in forests. (SSC CHSL 05/07/2024 3rd Shift)
options: and is found mostly in forests.
questions.explanation: Replace 'A owl' with 'An owl'. Vowel sound. स्वर ध्वनि के लिए 'an' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q142. I am going/to buy a red car/ with a leather seats/ and a sunroof. (SSC CHSL 05/07/2024 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: Remove 'a'. 'Seats' is plural. 'Seats' बहुवचन है, 'a' हटाएँ।

questions.question: Q143. Mrs. Arunima / Spesi / Telugu well. (SSC CHSL 08/07/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Spesi' is incorrect. Should be 'Speaks'. 'Spesi' गलत है, 'Speaks' होना चाहिए। Note: option text might be different, error is in the verb part.

questions.question: Q144. That day we reached late for the competition and even though the competition went on smooth, I felt bad about Shivani losing it. (SSC CHSL 08/07/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'smooth' with 'smoothly'. Adverb needed. क्रियाविशेषण 'smoothly' की आवश्यकता है।

questions.question: Q145. During winters, most of the trains are not running on time in North India. (SSC CHSL 08/07/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'are not running' with 'do not run'. Habitual action. आदत के लिए 'do not run' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q146. In this cold weather, / there's nothing/ like good/cup of coffee. (SSC CHSL 08/07/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'like good' with 'like a good'. Article needed. 'like a good' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q147. There's an quiet street down the left that you can use for your dance practice. (SSC CHSL 08/07/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'an' with 'a'. Consonant sound. व्यंजन ध्वनि के लिए 'a' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q148. A part/ of an / apple is / rotten (SSC CHSL 08/07/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'an' with 'the'. Specific apple. विशिष्ट सेब के लिए 'the' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q149. How long are you working / for your current employer / and why don't you / look for better opportunities? (SSC CHSL 08/07/2024 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'are you working' with 'have you been working'. Duration. अवधि के लिए 'have you been working' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q150. The judges eliminated the classical singer, as she dropped of/ in the middle of the competition. (SSC CHSL 08/07/2024 4th Shift)
options: in the middle of the competition.
classical singer, as she dropped of
questions.explanation: Replace 'dropped of' with 'dropped out'. Phrasal verb. 'Dropped out' (बाहर निकलना) सही है।

questions.question: Q151. In geography class,/ the teacher told the students, / "Switzerland lies / inside Germany, France, Austria, and Italy." (SSC CHSL 09/07/2024 1st Shift)
options: inside Germany, France, Austria, and Italy
questions.explanation: Replace 'inside' with 'between' or 'among'. Surrounded by. 'Between' (के बीच) का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q152. You expressed your opinion/ very clearly/but I am sorry/ I cannot agree to you'. (SSC CHSL 09/07/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'agree to' with 'agree with' (a person). व्यक्ति के साथ 'agree with' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q153. This is the story of eight round planets, the few rocks in between, and some comets. (SSC CHSL 09/07/2024 2nd Shift)
options: This is story of eight round planets, few rocks in between, and some comets.
This is the story of eight round planets, few rocks in between, and some comets.
This is the story of eight round planets, a few rocks in between, and some comets.
This is a story of eight round planets, few rocks in between, and some comets.
questions.explanation: Replace 'the few' with 'a few'. Indefinite number. अनिश्चित संख्या के लिए 'a few' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q154. Our plane / arrived at / the Mumbai airport / at the right time. (SSC CHSL 09/07/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Remove 'the' before 'Mumbai airport'. Proper nouns don't take articles. 'Mumbai airport' से पहले 'the' हटाएँ।

questions.question: Q155. The workers called out / the strike because / the management acceded to / all their demands. (SSC CHSL 09/07/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'called out' with 'called off'. Cancelled. 'Called off' (रद्द करना) का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q156. When the famous businessman / faced a huge loss / in his business, / no one expressed simpathy. (SSC CHSL 09/07/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Spelling error. 'Sympathy' is correct. 'Sympathy' सही वर्तनी है।

questions.question: Q157. A great / culture of hospitality of / the Spanish / is well - known. (SSC CHSL 09/07/2024 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'A great' with 'The great'. Specific culture. विशिष्ट संस्कृति के लिए 'The great' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q158. The volunteer gave on to / the food packets to the / children of the orphanage. (SSC CHSL 10/07/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'gave on to' with 'gave out'. Distributed. 'Gave out' (वितरित किया) का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q159. It was my niece / who was leaving college / last year, and / not my son. (SSC CHSL 10/07/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'was leaving' with 'left'. Simple past for 'last year'. 'Last year' के लिए 'left' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q160. Since childhood, Monty / ate his food / fast and he / will not change. (SSC CHSL 10/07/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'ate' with 'has eaten' or 'eats'. Present habit/continuation. 'has eaten' या 'eats' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q161. (A) It is sad / (B) that you / (C) are believing / (D) in superstitious rituals. (SSC CHSL 10/07/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'are believing' with 'believe'. Stative verb. 'Believe' का प्रयोग करें, यह stative verb है।

questions.question: Q162. After your insistence, / my sister / checked / a mailbox again. (SSC CHSL 10/07/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'a' with 'the'. Specific mailbox. विशिष्ट मेलबॉक्स के लिए 'the' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q163. In order to connect / these themes to a wider / historical context, Rahul go/beyond aesthetic analysis. (SSC CHSL 10/07/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'go' with 'goes'. Singular subject 'Rahul'. 'Rahul' एकवचन है, 'goes' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q164. Mathematics help/ in developing/ the logical mindset /of students. (SSC CHSL 10/07/2024 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'help' with 'helps'. Singular noun. 'Mathematics' एकवचन है, 'helps' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q165. The chief guest gave out prizes to the meritorious students of the school. (SSC CHSL 10/07/2024 4th Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'gave out' with 'gave away'. Distribute. 'Gave away' (वितरित करना) का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q166. William Wordsworth was a romantic poet. He did things in an unusual manner. (SSC CHSL 10/07/2024 4th Shift)
options: William Wordsworth was a romantic poet. He did things in an unusual manner.
William Wordsworth was a romantic poet. He did things in a unusual manner.
William Wordsworth was the romantic poet. He did things in a unusual manner.
William Wordsworth was romantic poet. He did things in an unusual manner.
questions.explanation: Correct articles. 'A romantic', 'an unusual'. सही articles का प्रयोग।

questions.question: Q167. She was fond of walking along the path besides the lake. (SSC CHSL 11/07/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'besides' with 'beside'. Next to. 'Beside' (बगल में) का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q168. Father took the newspaper / in his hand to/go through it once again. (SSC CHSL 11/07/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: No error. Sentence is correct. वाक्य सही है।

questions.question: Q169. Policeman came to my village and asked about a person who burgled a house last night. (SSC CHSL 11/07/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Add 'A' before 'Policeman'. Singular count noun. 'A policeman' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q170. It is his job / to chase out / clients with / outstanding debts. (SSC CHSL 11/07/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'chase out' with 'chase up' or 'chase'. Pursue. 'Chase up' (पीछा करना/वसूलना) का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q171. My Vice-Chancellor works / eighteen hours / a day, / seven days week. (SSC CHSL 11/07/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Add 'a' before 'week'. 'Seven days a week'. 'Seven days a week' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q172. It was possible to achieve anything, / if one has the grit and determination / to keep going. (SSC CHSL 11/07/2024 3rd Shift)
options: It was possible to achieve anything,
if one has the grit and determination
questions.explanation: Replace 'was' with 'is'. General truth. सामान्य सत्य के लिए 'is' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q173. The manager asked / the cooking team, "Who / among you is to baked the / Christmas cake this year?" (SSC CHSL 11/07/2024 4th Shift)
options: among you is to baked the
questions.explanation: Replace 'baked' with 'bake'. To + V1. 'To bake' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q174. We were grateful for a book they gave us. (SSC CPO 27/06/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'a' with 'the'. Specific book. विशिष्ट किताब के लिए 'the' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q175. Can we go visit a Statue of Liberty on our trip to the United States? (SSC CPO 27/06/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'a' with 'the'. Famous monument. प्रसिद्ध स्मारक के लिए 'the' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q176. I am understanding;/ you like her/ because she has /a generous nature. (SSC CPO 27/06/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace with 'I understand'. Stative verb. 'Understand' stative verb है, 'I understand' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q177. Since his son has not yet completed the age of eighteen, he was reluctant to fulfil his son's demand of getting a motorbike. (SSC CPO 27/06/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'was' with 'is'. Present tense context. वर्तमान काल के संदर्भ में 'is' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q178. When he resigned, / the company offered him / a huge sum of money but / he refused to agree to it. (SSC CPO 27/06/2024 1st Shift)
options: he refused to agree to it.
a huge sum of money but
questions.explanation: Replace 'agree to it' with 'accept it'. Offer is accepted. प्रस्ताव स्वीकार किया जाता है, 'accept it' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q179. Mrs. Gomathi was that tired and weak / that she could / scarcely walk. (SSC CPO 27/06/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'that' with 'so'. 'So...that' structure. 'So...that' संरचना का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q180. I will be arrange all the necessary materials for the programme. (SSC CPO 27/06/2024 2nd Shift)
options: I is arrange all the necessary materials for the programme.
I was arrange all the necessary materials for the programme.
I would arranging all the necessary materials for the programme.
I will be arranging all the necessary materials for the programme.
questions.explanation: Future continuous 'will be arranging'. Future continuous के लिए 'will be arranging' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q181. We were driving home when suddenly a deer runs across the road. (SSC CPO 27/06/2024 2nd Shift)
options: a deer runs across the road
questions.explanation: Replace 'runs' with 'ran'. Past tense. भूतकाल के लिए 'ran' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q182. One must do his/her duty proparly. (SSC CPO 27/06/2024 2nd Shift)
options: One must do once duty proparly.
One must do ones duty properly.
One must do one's duti proprly.
One must do one's duty properly
questions.explanation: Use 'one's' for 'one'. Spelling 'properly'. 'One' के लिए 'one's' का प्रयोग करें और 'properly' की वर्तनी सही करें।

questions.question: Q183. His energetic attitude / showed that he had / soundly slept / the previous night. (SSC CPO 27/06/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'soundly slept' with 'slept soundly'. Adverb after verb. क्रिया के बाद क्रियाविशेषण का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q184. It is a cheap reasonably / restaurant in this part of the town / where you can eat / delicious food. (SSC CPO 27/06/2024 2nd Shift)
options: restaurant in this part of the town
questions.explanation: Replace 'cheap reasonably' with 'reasonably cheap'. Adverb modifies adjective. क्रियाविशेषण विशेषण को संशोधित करता है।

questions.question: Q185. Mr. Vinu / has never / slept in / a igloo. (SSC CPO 27/06/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'a' with 'an'. Vowel sound. स्वर ध्वनि के लिए 'an' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q186. The art historian argued that the painting's value has been greatly underestimated... (SSC CPO 27/06/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'has been' with 'had been'. Past tense context. भूतकाल के संदर्भ में 'had been' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q187. My neighbours were serious injured in the car accident. (SSC CPO 27/06/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'serious' with 'seriously'. Adverb needed. क्रियाविशेषण 'seriously' की आवश्यकता है।

questions.question: Q188. I am working with him since 2002, / but even today / I am unable / to understand his motives. (SSC CPO 27/06/2024 3rd Shift)
options: I am working with him since 2002,
questions.explanation: Replace 'I am working' with 'I have been working'. Since 2002. 'Since' के साथ perfect continuous का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q189. Ms. Malathi is living lonely in an apartment. (SSC CPO 27/06/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'lonely' with 'alone'. 'Alone' means solo. 'Alone' (अकेला) का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q190. By the time I reaching / the metro station, / the train had departed. (SSC CPO 28/06/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'reaching' with 'reached'. Past action. भूतकाल की क्रिया के लिए 'reached' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q191. Mr. Thomas / is going / to buy / horse. (SSC CPO 28/06/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Add 'a' before 'horse'. Singular noun. 'A horse' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q192. My father is comparatively better today. (SSC CPO 28/06/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'better' with 'well' or remove 'comparatively'. Double comparison. 'Comparatively' के साथ positive degree 'well' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q193. If I have recovered from fever, / I will start going / for swimming classes / from tomorrow. (SSC CPO 28/06/2024 1st Shift)
options: If I have recovered from fever
questions.explanation: Replace 'have recovered' with 'recover'. First conditional. First conditional में 'recover' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q194. Last night I dreamed that I am looking for the/ abominable snowman high / up in the Himalayas. (SSC CPO 28/06/2024 1st Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'am looking' with 'was looking'. Past tense. भूतकाल के लिए 'was looking' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q195. When my father will come. I will make sure that I discuss the possibilities of a new business venture with him. (SSC CPO 28/06/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'will come' with 'comes'. Time clause. समय उपवाक्य में 'comes' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q196. Soldiers in / the Indian Armed Forces are / trained never to/fight cowardly. (SSC CPO 28/06/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'cowardly' with 'in a cowardly manner'. 'Cowardly' adjective है, adverb phrase का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q197. Select the incorrect form of the verb. (SSC CPO 28/06/2024 2nd Shift)
questions.explanation: 'Strucken' is incorrect. The past participle of 'strike' is 'struck' or 'stricken'. 'Strucken' गलत है।

questions.question: Q198. The committee work diligently to ensure fair and unbiased decision. (SSC CPO 28/06/2024 2nd Shift)
options: The committee is work diligently to ensure fair and unbiased decision.
The committee worked diligently to ensure fair and unbiased decision.
The committee has work diligently to ensure fair and unbiased decision.
The committee works diligently to ensure fair and unbiased decision.
questions.explanation: Subject 'committee' (singular here) takes 'works'. 'Committee' के साथ 'works' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q199. The people of / Jammu and Kashmir / has emphasised and / appreciated transparency. (SSC CPO 28/06/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Replace 'has' with 'have'. 'People' is plural. 'People' बहुवचन है, 'have' का प्रयोग करें।

questions.question: Q200. Himalayas include the highest mountains in the world and feed almost 20% of the earth's population. (SSC CPO 28/06/2024 3rd Shift)
questions.explanation: Add 'The' before 'Himalayas'. Mountain ranges take 'the'. पर्वत श्रृंखलाओं के नाम से पहले 'The' लगाएँ।
